#  Create an Invoice Report in Portfolio Financials and Capital Planning 
#####  Legacy
The information in this tutorial applies to accounts with the [Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/) product in Procore. Reach out to your Procore point of contact for more information.
##  Background 
Invoice Reporting allows you to report on invoices submitted vendors in any project. This is useful if you want to know much you were invoiced in a given month, or if you want to see which invoices from the last month are still pending approval.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Full Access' to the project or higher.  
_Note:_ Users with 'Full Access' permissions can only create invoice reports for the projects they have access to.


##  Steps 
#####  Tip
To see a list of data points for custom reports, see [What are the data points available for custom reports in Portfolio Financials and Capital Planning?](https://support.procore.com/faq/what-are-the-data-points-available-for-custom-reports-in-portfolio-financials-and-capital-planning)
  1. From the **Dashboard** , click the **Reporting** tab.  
_Note:_ The Reporting tool automatically opens the Custom Reports tab.
  2. Click the **Report By** drop-down menu and select **Invoice**.  
  
![Report By Invoice](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/f1749e746d5e57a52618642eee5a27c7/f9803839c74793fd2637c2f637ed9767/report-by-invoice.png?fm=webp)  

  3. Click the **filters** ![Icon Filter Pfcp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e441a59db49a791c3e0da69c4aea8f98/e0325813ad105f260469c8d43564b402/icon-filter-pfcp.png?fm=webp&h=20) icon to expand the Filters panel.
  4. Click **Columns**.  
This is is where you will select the specific data points that you want to include in your report (see example below).  
![Column Names](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b034593cdfbc962f9f05e7bf9aee69b0/7972f28b03f1f72afb920a9d0bceec3b/column-names.png?fm=webp)
     * **To select columns** :
       1. Click a section to see the options.
       2. Mark the checkboxes next to the columns you want to include in your report.
  5. Click **Groupings** to expand the section for different grouping options. Groupings help to create a visual distinction between sections, and can be used to calculate subtotals by group. The image below shows Contract Name and Invoice Status as groupings.![Invoice Groupings](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/aa01a80abc860d7e9e388893fb002ff5/eae7a0686563e33e40e2ebeebe43af99/invoice-groupings.png?fm=webp)
     * **To select or manage groupings** :
       1. Select a data point from the drop-down menu to group by.
       2. The following options are available:
          * To add a grouping, click the **plus** ![Icon Orange Plus Pfcp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8da8f1373babf944000512c50dc5d93e/7079cbdf8f59f0337970c497634197e8/icon-orange-plus-pfcp.png?fm=webp&h=20) icon next to 'Add Another Grouping'.  
_Note_ : You can have up to three groupings on a report.
          * To delete a grouping, click the **remove**![Icon X Remove Pfcp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/f267e010b2e9589eec9d83b774ec5939/bc2f0945e95d2dd8102b7079e92b9ae8/icon-x-remove-pfcp.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon next to the grouping.
          * To reorder groupings, click the **reorder grip** ![Icon Reorder Grip Pfcp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/68bee87eab650a0e7db62271a300e37d/35244f8c922e7bd52e1797a7c65c7a63/icon-reorder-grip-pfcp.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon and drag a grouping to another location.
          * To show sub totals for a grouping, click the **Sub Total** toggle to the ON ![Icon Toggle On Pfcp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/6e94c0cbe83d69e90aff8578cce4162b/50f3875bdca0dee73c9887099e1e4fef/icon-toggle-on-pfcp.png?fm=webp&h=17) position.  
OR  
To hide sub totals for a grouping, click the **Sub Total** toggle to the OFF ![Icon Toggle Off Pfcp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/06c88a04a0a009228978215e33ebfc51/61458b54220c3f497e09d189acea5fc0/icon-toggle-off-pfcp.png?fm=webp&h=17) position.
  6. To continue refining your report, scroll down to **Refine**.  
For example, you can choose to report only on invoices that are pending approval, or report only on invoices submitted in a certain month.  
![Invoice Refine By](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d02b47204d0653c464fd9eb5363ad775/dd7826d1a07fa7a03144f1807c22039b/invoice-refine-by.png?fm=webp)
     * **To refine the report** :
       1. Click a section under Refine to see the options.
       2. Mark the checkboxes next to the filters you want to refine the report by. 
#####  Tip
If you have an integration set up for your Portfolio Financials and Capital Planning account and send invoices to Accounts Payable, you can refine your report to show invoices that have not yet been sent to AP. You can also pull the 'Sent to AP' status in as a column to be seen across various reports.
  7. _Optional:_ If there is a certain combination of filters you prefer, you can save the current report view. Views that you save can be selected at any time from the 'Saved Views' drop-down menu.
     * **To save your view** :
       1. Click **Save Current View**.  
![Invoice Save View](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/272749f269254dac88a0863a2395a649/2e1465012b25a9d9acb0d1a6cac1cbe8/invoice-save-view.png?fm=webp)
       2. Enter a name for the report in the Report Name field.
       3. Click **Save**.
  8. _Optional:_ To export a copy of the report to your computer, click **Export**.  
A Microsoft Excel file will download to your computer.


## See Also
  * [Create a Custom Report in Portfolio Financials and Capital Planning](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/create-a-custom-report-in-portfolio-financials-and-capital-planning)
  * [Create a Cost Item Detail Report in Portfolio Financials and Capital Planning](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/create-a-cost-item-detail-report-in-portfolio-financials-and-capital-planning)
